name: mcp-connectwise-psa
description: ConnectWise PSA (Manage) — tickets, time entries, companies, and configurations
long_description: MCP server for the ConnectWise PSA (Manage) REST API. Search and update tickets, log and review time entries, and look up companies and configurations — using your own ConnectWise API member keys, so everything is attributed to you.

cw_site.title: ConnectWise site
cw_site.description: Your ConnectWise host, e.g. na.myconnectwise.net or an on-prem hostname

cw_company_id.title: Company ID
cw_company_id.description: The company id you log in to ConnectWise with

cw_client_id.title: Integration client ID
cw_client_id.description: Register an integration at developer.connectwise.com to get one

cw_private_key.title: API private key
cw_private_key.description: Shown once when the key pair is created

cw_member_identifier.title: Member identifier (optional)
cw_member_identifier.description: Your ConnectWise member id — enables "my tickets" and "my time" tools on older on-prem versions
